---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new engine
title: '[feat] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? (e.g. "Brave snippets are empty")

## Solution
What should happen?

## Alternatives considered
Any other approaches?

## Milestone
Which version milestone does this belong to? (e.g. v0.0.1, v0.0.2)

## Checks
- [ ] New engine? → read AGENTS.md "Add a new search engine" guide
- [ ] Needs CSS selector update? → attach sample HTML
- [ ] Breaking change to response format?
